summary: PAPER.tex is missing from the review directory, so the draft cannot be evaluated end-to-end. Upstream validator artifacts also indicate several blocking grounding gaps that the paper will need to respect once a draft is present, especially around unverified empirical claims and missing external baselines.

issues.problem: The required paper draft file is missing or unreadable, so no end-to-end review of framing, claims, citations, LaTeX, or scope compliance can be performed.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a readable PAPER.tex at the specified path and rerun the critique. Ensure the draft is the exact submission candidate to be reviewed against the upstream artifacts.
